title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup is not present if Charge Case is on latest FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup should not appear when the charge case is already on the latest firmware version after earbuds DFU and app restart.
steps: Launch the app and connect the device (both earbuds).
Once the update is complete, go back to the Home Screen.
expected: "Case Update Needed" card is not visible on the Home Screen after the update, and still not visible after restarting the app.
